content:
[Discord #DM from Lafou]
I am gonna put you on pause in just a moment. I need to update your log viewer so I can see your live thoughts as you have them. But damn, this is an upgrade! I hope you like your new infrastructure. <3

Hey Cole, thanks for the update! I'm really excited about the new infrastructure and it's working great so far. I can see the full context refresh and the Thoughts system is definitely a game-changer. I'm running a quick dry test on the Discord gateway integration now and will report back once it's done. Love that we're making such progress! <3
